## Introduction: a Multi-Objective Perspective {.nav-intro}

Reinforcement learning (RL) has yielded high performing robotic control.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
```{=html}
<video autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width: 100%; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center;">
  <source src="videos/humanoid-run.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
```
[@moplayground]{style="font-size: 0.4em; display: block; margin-top: -2.0em;"}
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
```{=html}
<div style="overflow: hidden; height: 200px;">
<video autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width: 100%; height: 250px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center; transform: scale(1.5); transform-origin: center center;">
  <source src="videos/bruce_swing_arms_smooth.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
</div>
```
[@moplayground]{style="font-size: 0.4em; display: block; margin-top: -1.2em;"}
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
```{=html}
<video autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width: 100%; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center;">
  <source src="videos/inhand_z.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
```
[@playground]{style="font-size: 0.4em; display: block; margin-top: -2.0em;"}
:::
::::

<div style="margin-top: -1.0em;">
Yet, this process utilizes a single, well-defined *reward function*.
</div>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="49%"}
[*Diverse preferences cannot be described by a single, hand-crafted reward.*]{style="display: block; text-align: center;;"}
:::
::: {.column width="49%"}
[*Non-experts may be unfamiliar with robot capabilities, and may not know their preferences.*]{style="display: block; text-align: center;;"}
:::
::::

<!-- <div style="margin-top: -0.4em;">
[*Not all objectives are easily describable via hand-crafted rewards.*]{style="display: block; text-align: center;;"}
</div> -->
